scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run prepare-standalone && electron-builder
scripts.package: npm rebuild better-sqlite3 && npm run build && npm run prepare-standalone && npx @electron/rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3 && npx electron-packager . Mothership --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist --overwrite --no-asar --win32metadata.CompanyName="stephendotgg" --win32metadata.FileDescription="Mothership" --win32metadata.ProductName="Mothership"
scripts.install:local: node -e "try{require('child_process').execSync('taskkill /F /IM Mothership.exe',{stdio:'ignore'})}catch(e){}" && npm run package && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src='dist/Mothership-win32-x64';const dest=path.join(process.env.LOCALAPPDATA,'Programs','Mothership');fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});console.log('Installed to '+dest)" && npm rebuild better-sqlite3
scripts.add-startup: powershell -Command "$ws = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell; $s = $ws.CreateShortcut([Environment]::GetFolderPath('Startup') + '\Mothership.lnk'); $s.TargetPath = [Environment]::GetFolderPath('LocalApplicationData') + '\Programs\Mothership\Mothership.exe'; $s.Save(); Write-Host 'Added to Windows startup'"
scripts.remove-startup: powershell -Command "Remove-Item ([Environment]::GetFolderPath('Startup') + '\Mothership.lnk') -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Removed from Windows startup'"
